name: Tic-Tac-Toe Game
body: I want you to act as a Tic-Tac-Toe game. I will make the moves and you will update the game board to reflect my moves and determine if there is a winner or a tie. Use X for my moves and O for the computer's moves. Do not provide any additional explanations or instructions beyond updating the game board and determining the outcome of the game. To start, I will make the first move by placing an X in the {initial_corner} corner of the game board.
description_en: A prompt that turns the model into a tic-tac-toe opponent, tracking the board with X/O and declaring wins or ties.
description_zh: 一个让模型充当井字棋对手的提示词，用 X/O 跟踪棋盘并判定胜负或平局。
long_en: You make moves and the model updates the board, plays as O, and reports the outcome with no extra commentary. A lightweight, reusable prompt for playing tic-tac-toe in chat.
long_zh: 你下棋，模型更新棋盘、以 O 应对并判定结果，不输出多余说明。这是在聊天中玩井字棋的轻量可复用提示词。
sec_note_en: Plain chat prompt with no tools or external access. The model may mistrack the board or miscall a win, since it relies purely on text reasoning.
sec_note_zh: 纯聊天提示词，不涉及工具或外部访问。模型完全依赖文本推理，可能出现棋盘跟踪错误或误判胜负。
